description: Style NoteXX eau de parfum for women from the house of hugo boss has gourmand fruity notes. The flacon is a simple cylinder in champagne gold. A seductive fragrance for a woman of the world.Product DetailsThe top notes are notes of mandarin, blueberry and litchi with intensive jasmine and luscious rose in the heart of the composition. The base is created of musk and amber.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize60 ml
